title: Validate cohort exclusion for users with immediate content consumption
description: Test that users who start consuming content within 5 minutes of activating their trial are excluded from the 'Trial Corner' experiment.
preconditions: User has just activated a new ₹1 trial.

steps.description: 1. Within 4 minutes of activating the trial, start playing any video content.
2. Watch the content for at least 1 minute.
3. Navigate back to the homepage and check for the 'Trial Mode' widget.
4. Navigate to the 'Manage Subscription' section of the profile.

expected_result: The user does NOT see the 'Trial Corner' widget or pill on the homepage. The 'Manage Subscription' section shows the old/standard trial management UI, not the new Trial Corner flow.
